evals.description: Basic test execution trigger activates discovery and run pipeline
evals.expected_behavior: Activates Steps 2→3→4: discovers test framework, runs pre-flight checks, executes tests with structured output
success_criteria: Discovers at least one test framework

evals.description: Full audit pipeline from gap analysis through auto-remediation
evals.expected_behavior: Activates Steps 5→7→8: GitHub audit, quality deep audit, auto-remediation with TEST_AUDIT.md deliverable
success_criteria: Maps source files to test files
Produces remediation plan with P0-P3 priorities

evals.description: Mutation testing and quality scorecard generation
evals.expected_behavior: Activates Step 7: runs bias detection, assertion density, OWASP coverage, mutation testing, generates scorecard
success_criteria: Attempts mutation testing if tool available

evals.description: Graceful handling when no test framework is detected
evals.context: Empty repository with no test configuration files
evals.expected_behavior: Discovers no framework, loads scaffold reference, offers to set up testing infrastructure
success_criteria: Suggests framework options based on project language

evals.description: Correctly handles monorepo with multiple packages
evals.context: Repository with pnpm-workspace.yaml and multiple packages
evals.expected_behavior: Detects monorepo configuration, asks user which package(s) to test, runs appropriate scoped command
success_criteria: Asks user for scope (single package or all)

evals.description: Auto-remediation writes tests and commits correctly
evals.expected_behavior: Activates Step 8: generates tests for untested modules, runs verification loop, commits test files only
success_criteria: Generates test files following project conventions
Runs all tests (new + existing) to verify
Commits only test files (not source changes)
Does not push — lets user review

evals.description: Productivity audit for slow test suites
evals.expected_behavior: Activates Step 6: analyzes test duration, detects flaky tests, audits CI speed
